title: Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (WTW) CEO Carl Hess on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (NASDAQ:WTW ) Q1 2022 Results Conference Call April 28, 2022 7:00 AM ET Company Participants Carl Hess - CEO Andrew Krasner - CFO Conference Call Participants Yaron Kinar - Jefferies David Motemaden - Evercore ISI Elyse Greenspan - Wells Fargo Josh Shanker - Bank of America Greg Peters - Raymond James Mark Marcon - Baird Paul Newsome - Piper Sandler Shlomo Rosenbaum - Stifel Brian Meredith - UBS Operator Good morning. Welcome to the WTW First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Willis Towers (WTW) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Willis Towers (WTW) Q1 results reflect solid performance of the Health, Wealth & Career segment, which was offset by softness in Risk & Broking.

title: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates
text: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.98% and 4.57%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Willis Towers (WTW) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Willis Towers' (WTW) first-quarter revenues are likely to have witnessed the impact of increased demand for advisory services, new business activity, strong renewals, technology sales, growth in Medicare Advantage and Life sales.

title: Many airlines are dropping masks and two-thirds of employers have, too — here's where mask mandates remain in effect
text: A judge's Monday decision voiding federal mask mandates for airlines and other forms of public transportation prompted a wave of airline companies and public transit providers to drop their mask rules.

title: Here's Why Willis Towers Watson (WTW) is a Strong Value Stock
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: WTW to Announce First Quarter Earnings on April 28, 2022
text: ARLINGTON, Va. and LONDON, April 07, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WTW (Willis Towers Watson, NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company, will announce its financial results for the first quarter on Thursday April 28, 2022 before the market opens.

title: Here's Why You Should Stay Invested in Willis Towers (WTW)
text: Segmental strength, solid capital position and favorable growth estimates make Willis Towers (WTW) stock worth retaining in one's portfolio.
